assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes MigrationsAssembly set to the current project assembly in both store configurations
assertions.rationale: Both stores set MigrationsAssembly, though using Assembly.FullName instead of GetName().Name.

assertions.assertion: The response includes a dotnet ef migrations add command with -c ConfigurationDbContext
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef migrations add Init -c ConfigurationDbContext is provided.

assertions.assertion: The response includes a dotnet ef migrations add command with -c PersistedGrantDbContext
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef migrations add Init -c PersistedGrantDbContext is provided.

assertions.assertion: The response includes dotnet ef database update commands for both contexts
assertions.rationale: dotnet ef database update commands for both contexts are provided.
